g.text: Query Optimizer Memory Layout & Alignment Analysis
Cache Line 3 (0xC0 - 0xFF) | DP Table Entry (Hot Path)

ul.li: Sizeof(PlanNode) = 64 Bytes (Matches Architecture-specific L1 Cache Line).
Alignment: Standard 8-byte boundary enforced for all void* and float64 types.

Cache Locality: The Dynamic Programming (DP) Table Hot Path is explicitly packed into a single 64B cache line to prevent False Sharing in multi-threaded optimization and to minimize L1 Data Cache misses during the search phase.
Memory Growth: Structs grow downwards (increasing offsets).
